name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Miami's Superb Cash Advance at 907 NW 27th Ave, FL offers fast payday and title loans.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance is located at 907 NW 27th Ave #200 in Miami, FL, in a convenient standalone storefront. The location serves the Wynwood/Buena Vista neighborhood with extended weekday hours from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, Monday through Friday, and weekend hours from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM on Saturdays and Sundays.

This Miami location specializes in payday loans and title loans, offering quick approvals for residents who need cash between paychecks or against their vehicle's title. You can apply in person at the store or call 786-822-6671 to speak with a loan specialist about your options and requirements.

If you're a Miami resident in need of immediate funds, bring a valid government ID, proof of income, and proof of address to your appointment. Superb Cash Advance provides a straightforward alternative to traditional banking for short-term cash needs.
pros: Same-day cash approval and disbursement available
No credit check required; accepts all credit types
Loan amounts up to $5,000 online and up to $50,000 for bad credit products
Flexible, customized payment schedules based on individual budget constraints
Convenient physical location with extended hours (8:30am-8:30pm weekdays, 9:30am-6:30pm weekends)
Friendly, non-judgmental staff that doesn't ask excessive qualifying questions
cons: Website contains no APR, interest rate, or fee information—critical for payday/cash advance products
Inconsistency between advertised locations (website shows Atlanta but reviews mention Arvada service)
No disclosure of loan terms, repayment period, or default consequences
No mention of regulatory oversight, licensing, or third-party ratings
High-cost lending product category with inherent risk of debt cycles not addressed in marketing
best_for: Consumers with bad credit or no credit history needing emergency cash within 24 hours
Individuals without access to traditional bank loans or credit cards
People who need small amounts ($250-$1,000) and prefer in-person application and same-day cash pickup
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans and need same-day cash access. The primary caveat is the complete absence of transparent pricing and terms disclosure on their website—borrowers must visit in person or call to understand the true cost of borrowing, which is a standard red flag in the payday lending industry.
services: Unsecured personal loans for all credit types
Quick installment loans with flexible payment schedules
In-person loan processing at physical location
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 907 NW 27th Ave, Miami, FL. Quick payday and title loan approvals.
